productName: Sitka Classic Cascade Cream Hashish Joint (H)
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps Cascade Cream flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — a smooth, creamy flavor, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe. A little goes a long way.
